concepts.title: F.L.A.G.S.: The Five Universal Psychological Weaknesses
concepts.description: Fear, Lust, Anger, Greed, Sympathy as five emotional states that bypass rational cognition; neurological substrate (amygdala/insula/anterior cingulate activation); operationalization across negotiation/seduction/intelligence/conflict; self-defense through metacognition

concepts.title: Eighteen Links: The Extended Vulnerability Matrix
concepts.description: disaggregates F.L.A.G.S. into 18 specific vulnerabilities across three temporal vectors (past/present/future) and six operational angles (body/mind/substance/land/life/self); link-identification protocol; clustering patterns revealing psychological architecture; operationalization through conversation analysis

concepts.title: Junishi-do-Jutsu: Twelve Zodiacal Personality Archetypes
concepts.description: 12 zodiacal personality types (Rat through Pig) with core motivations, vulnerabilities, optimal pressure vectors; cross-cultural personality taxonomy with predictive exploitation mapping

concepts.title: Shinigami Framework: Seven Categories of Hidden Shame
concepts.description: 7 categorical shame-vulnerabilities (birth, body, health, failure, sex, crime, death) with characteristic suppression patterns; diagnostic framework for identifying pressure-points through shame-topology

concepts.title: Kautilya's Arthasastra: Governance as Influence Blueprint
concepts.description: 4th century Indian governance doctrine treating spies, information control, psychological destabilization, and fear as systemic governance tools; ancient blueprint for modern institutional influence

concepts.title: Vulnerability Mapping: The Complete Integration System
concepts.description: Integration of F.L.A.G.S. + Eighteen Links + Chakra System + Five Virgins into single coherent operational system; three-layer integration (emotional levers → vulnerability distribution → chakra fixation → sensory channels); reading protocol and operationalization (direct activation, indirect channel activation, misdirection with simultaneous activation); ethical tension between understanding and exploitation; prerequisite for sophisticated multi-framework tactical deployment; requires State 3+ consciousness to execute

concepts.title: Ping-Fa Strategy: The Eight-Point Operational System
concepts.description: Eight-point sequence (Measure → Calculate → Plan → Scheme → Direct → Indirect → Timing/Space → Victory/Defeat) mapping complete strategic arc from reconnaissance to outcome; identical structure applies to military warfare, seduction, business, intelligence operations; integration with Eighteen Links (vulnerability identification at point 1) and F.L.A.G.S. (emotional levers deployed at points 3-4); cross-domain connections to eastern-spirituality (Ping-Fa as divine testing through illusion) + psychology (psychological control architecture)

concepts.title: Mind Like Water: The Four States of Consciousness
concepts.description: Four consciousness states (Scattered Mind → Focused Mind → Empty Mind → Water Mind) required for tactical execution; Scattered=unintegrated, Focused=single-track attention, Empty=automated execution + real-time perception, Water=intuitive fluid response; state-sequence cannot be skipped; 1000+ hours required per state transition; prerequisite for executing advanced Ping-Fa, simultaneous Eighteen Links activation, complex direct/indirect coordination; training progression (Phase 1-3: building focused→empty→water mind); cross-domain connections to psychology (chakra integration levels) + eastern-spirituality (sahaja samadhi/natural state consciousness)

concepts.title: Three Treasures: The Strategic Positioning Framework
concepts.description: Three fundamental strategic modalities (Sword/direct force + authority, Jewel/seduction + bonding, Mirror/information + perspective shift); characteristic differences (speed, visibility, permanence, psychological effect, reversibility); operational structure for each treasure; integration with Ping-Fa (determines which treasure carries each point) and Vulnerability Mapping (determines approach to activation); failure modes (Sword without power, Jewel without authentic offering, Mirror without genuine wisdom); cross-domain connections to psychology (personality-based development pathways) + eastern-spirituality (spiritual teaching modalities)

concepts.title: Zetsu-Jutsu: Japanese Word Weaponry
concepts.description: Three tactical word categories (White Talk/positive strokes, Black Talk/offensive language, Gray Talk/gossip-confusion) with sequential ordering creating predictable psychological responses; tactical language as weaponized communication

concepts.title: 11 Propaganda Ploys: Comprehensive Tactical Taxonomy
concepts.description: Modular tactical techniques (Identification, Bandwagon, Testimonial, Transfer, Name-calling, Stroking, Purr/Skir Generality, Faulty Reasoning, Assumption, Selective Memory, Pressure) targeting specific cognitive biases; replicable influence toolkit

concepts.title: Hannibal's Tactical Principles: Strategic Asymmetry
concepts.description: Asymmetric warfare framework where numerically disadvantaged operator dictates terms through superior opponent-understanding and strategic positioning; opponent's assumed strengths become liabilities

concepts.title: Shadow Government & Institutional Capture
concepts.description: Four-level institutional control (information control, social network positioning, institutional process control, narrative control); captures institutions while maintaining appearance of independence

concepts.title: Nine Gates: The Distraction Architecture
concepts.description: Nine attentional capture mechanisms (Novelty, Emotional Activation, Self-Reference, Cognitive Load, Social Pressure, Scarcity/Urgency, Narrative Immersion, Authority, Familiarity/Liking); implementation of Ping-Fa points 4 (Scheme) and 6 (Indirect Maneuver); sequential and simultaneous deployment models; integration with Vulnerability Mapping and Three Treasures; defense through attentional awareness; cross-domain connections to psychology (cognitive hijacking and attentional capture) + eastern-spirituality (illusion/maya mechanics)

concepts.title: Face-Reading: Siang Mien as Tactical Emotion Detection
concepts.description: Three thousand daily expressions, most involuntary; facial asymmetry revealing active deception; left side (conscious) vs. right side (subconscious) discrepancy; upper face (primary emotion) vs. lower face (social emotion) distinction; Five Elements facial archetypes as character/activation prediction; body language integration for state verification; tactical application in real-time feedback during negotiation/seduction/interrogation; gender-typical vs. gender-atypical expression patterns; cross-domain connections to psychology (emotional dissonance diagnostic), eastern-spirituality (karma expression in face), behavioral-mechanics (vulnerability identification via real-time emotion reading)

concepts.title: Yuku Mireba: Power of Seeing — Tell-Spotting

concepts.title: Watchers/Listeners/Touchers: Sensory Mode Classification

concepts.title: Shadow Ki Hypnosis: Unconscious Influence

concepts.title: Sexual Feng Shui: Environmental Design for Arousal and Bonding

concepts.title: NLP Sensory Modalities: Representational Systems as Tactical Access Points
concepts.description: Three sensory processing modalities (visual/auditory/kinesthetic) as primary thinking mode; modality-specific language signatures and vulnerability patterns; modality matching for maximum rapport, mismatching for disorientation; cross-modal bridges and tactical sequencing; cross-domain connections to psychology (cognitive style as learning preference and trauma-based dissociation), eastern-spirituality (modality as chakra expression), behavioral-mechanics (modality targeting as precision influence)

concepts.title: V.A.L.U.E. Framework: Personal Propaganda for Influence
concepts.description: Five-component presence architecture (Vulnerability/strategic disclosure, Altruism/apparent other-centeredness, Loving/genuine care, Uniqueness/distinctiveness, Empathy/understanding); five simultaneous trust-pathways activating different psychological mechanisms

concepts.title: Nine Temptations of Faust: Escalating Desire Sequence

concepts.title: Suggestology: Subliminal Suggestion Science
concepts.description: Science of introducing ideas below conscious awareness threshold through sensory subliminal, cognitive subliminal, or state-based suggestion; four functional pathways (behavioral priming, belief installation, memory reconstruction, identity integration)

concepts.title: Memory Manipulation & False Memory Implantation
concepts.description: Three-stage protocol for reconstructing memories (destabilization through contradiction/authority/overwhelm, alternative narrative introduction, reinforcement through repetition/anchoring/confirmation); operates on memory's reconstructive nature

concepts.title: Yoritomo's Twelve Cuts: Methods of Influence
concepts.description: Twelve pathways through which one person's determination reshapes another's choices; explicit substitution of will for another's without knowledge; twelve channels of influence (psychic forces, persuasion, eyes, words, example, psychic influences, decision, ambition, perseverance, concentration, confidence, sympathy); sequential and integrated deployment; mastery of will as force; cross-domain connections to psychology (neurobiological mechanisms of synchronization), eastern-spirituality (will and consciousness transformation), behavioral-mechanics (influence as systems architecture)

concepts.title: Cao Dai Five Jewels: Stratagem Stages
concepts.description: Vietnamese Black Crow intelligence framework; five sequential stages of vulnerability engineering (Can Nao/war of nerves, Dom Do/watch, Coi Mach/evaluate, Ngu Quan/five weaknesses, Choc/draw out); assessment → intelligence → analysis → vulnerability identification → targeted approach; simultaneous multi-vector deployment; application in battlefield/negotiation/seduction contexts; dazzlement as distraction technology; cross-domain connections to psychology (vulnerability patterns), eastern-spirituality (activation and transmission), behavioral-mechanics (multi-vector framework)

concepts.title: Yakuza Code: Honor Among Outlaws
